questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a How did the evolution from 4G to 5G improved voices on internet protocol services? 2.5 b Explain the concept of “mobility” in wireless networks. Why is it important? 2.5 c What is meant by a "handover" in cellular systems? Briefly describe its importance. 2.5 d Why is cell capacity planning critical in mobile network design? 2.5 e What is quantization noise? How does it affect signal quality? 2.5 f What is the key idea behind packet reservation multiple access ? 2.5 g Why is OFDMA more suitable for 4G systems than FDMA? 2.5 h What is duplexing in wireless communication? How is FDD different from TDD? 2.5
Explain the concept of cell splitting and frequency reuse in cellular communication. How do these techniques improve cell capacity and coverage? 10
Discuss the roadmap for achieving higher data rate capability in 6G systems. What role does spectrum management play in this context? 10
Illustrate the OSI reference model and discuss its relevance in wireless data communication. 10
Discuss the different types of transmission impairments such as attenuation, phase distortion, and noise. How do these affect communication performance? 10
What are random access methods? Explain the working of Pure ALOHA, Slotted ALOHA, and CSMA techniques with the help of diagrams. 10
Discuss the significance of spectral efficiency in wireless networks. How do multiple accesses impact overall system performance? 10
What are the main differences between wired and wireless networks in terms of design, performance, and reliability? 10
Describe the characteristics and applications of wide area networks in next generation wireless communication networks. 10
